body.title: Scraps: embedding engine — text in, vector out, no inference at query time
body.result: embed()/embed_batch() in devices/scraps/embedding_engine.py. OpenAI text-embedding-3-small primary; hash-SHA-256-384 fallback. 11 tests green.
body.description:
Add a Scraps script that accepts text input and returns an embedding vector. Batched operation supported. Stores model name and embedding dimension as metadata alongside the vector. Enables pre-computed embeddings at write time — query-time similarity search is then pure vector math with no inference call.

The write path (T-memory-write-path) calls Scraps at memory-write time to compute and store the embedding. The retrieval path (T-librarian-retrieval-service) calls Scraps at query time to vectorize the query, then does similarity math in DB.

**Affected files:** devices/scraps/ (new script)
**Design rules:** no inference at query time; model metadata (name, dimension) must be stored with vector; batch mode required for write-time efficiency
**Scope boundary:** Scraps device only — does not write to clan.memories directly; caller (Librarian write path) owns the DB write
**Test plan:** script accepts a string, returns float vector of expected dimension; batch mode handles list of strings; model metadata returned with each vector; same input returns same vector (deterministic)
